temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A close-up shot shows a young, blonde-haired boy with tears welling up in his eyes. He looks distressed and is being comforted by an adult's hands, which are gently holding his face and head. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a scene of emotional distress, introducing a young boy who is upset and being cared for by an unseen adult.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, whimpering. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:04-00:07) The boy continues to cry, his face contorted in sadness. The adult's hands remain on his head and neck, trying to soothe him. The boy pleads with the person off-screen. (Storyline: The boy's distress escalates as he begins to speak, pleading with the person comforting him, though his words are initially muffled by his sobs.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pleading, sobbing. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
